name: usage-guard
description: Codex continuity guard for model retention, reset-credit reuse, and emergency handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex capable, resettable, and ready to hand off.
interface.longDescription: Usage Guard keeps the current model during Additional safety checks, automatically consumes an available reset credit at 97%, and prepares handoff.org if that redeem failed and usage later exceeds 98%.
capabilities: Keep current model during safety buffering
interface.defaultPrompt: Verify all three Usage Guard continuity protections.
